notes: Provide a reference sheet with this quiz

questions.text: A 3.75 kg bowling ball is located 0.850 meters from an 900.kg spaceship. Determine the magnitude of the force of gravity between the bowling ball and the spaceship.
Naiad is a moon of Neptune. It is 4.8E7 meters from Neptune. Its mass is 1.2E17 kg. Neptune has a mass of 1.02E26 kg. Determine the magnitude of gravitational force between Naiad and Neptune.
What is the magnitude of force between Saturn and the Sun? Is that force attractive or repulsive?
